LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: A R G U E D. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT ATHAVAN THAV'S MOTION TO RECLASSIFY CASE FROM THE UNLIMITED JURISDICTION COURT TO THE LIMITED JURISDICTION COURT IS DENIED. FIRST, DEFENDANT FAILS TO EXPLAIN WHY THE MOTION COULD NOT HAVE BEEN FILED EARLIER AND FAILS TO COMPLY WITH CCP 403.040(B)(2). SECOND, DEFENDANT FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT RECOVERY OVER $25,000 IS VIRTUALLY UNATTAINABLE. SEE WALKER V. SUP. CRT. (1991) 53 CAL.3D 257, 269. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR # 4761
9 MOTIONS IN LIMINE FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT THAV, ATHAVAN OTTO

CASE IS SETTLED WITH TERMS ON THE RECORD. CONTINUED TO AUG-16-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN 306 FOR CONFIRMATION OF SETTLEMENT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO, CLERK: K. LEE, REPORTER: TAMARA WILLAT, CSR #4609, DEPT 306

calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-14-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-10-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-10-2013 Continued To Aug-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 306

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Reclassify Case From The Unlimited Jurisdiction Court To The Limited Jurisdiction Court
Off Calendar May-13-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Diana Rivera, Esq. of Tharpe & Howell, Tel. 818.205.9955, for defendant and moving party by Court Call;
Christofer C. Nolan, Esq. of Brent Fiol & Nolan, Tel. 415.984.0416, for plaintiff and opposing party by Court Call.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ATHAVAN THAV's Motion To Reclassify Case From The Unlimited Jurisdiction Court To The Limited Jurisdiction Court is denied. First, defendant fails to explain why the motion could not have been filed earlier and fails to comply with CCP 403.040(b)(2). Second, defendant fails to demonstrate that recovery over $25,000 is virtually unattainable. See Walker v. Sup. Crt. (1991) 53 Cal.3d 257, 269. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR # 4761

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Set For Trial On Jun-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Continued To Nov-21-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
